tasks.subject: Task 1: Projection seam + grid dataclasses conform
tasks.description:

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_projection.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_grid.py -v

tasks.subject: Task 2: Operator consumes Projection; carries q_prior; _diag equivalence (C3)
tasks.description:

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_gmrf_method.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_grid.py -v && rg bilinear_weights(self.grid|self.grid.shape src/sverdrup/methods/gmrf.py

tasks.subject: Task 6: Tile-adjacency graph + max-overlap spanning tree (Stage-B redesign)
tasks.description:
**DESIGN PIVOT (owner-confirmed):** synthesized strip field (`_draw_joint`/`_strip_prior`) DISPROVED (376x cross-seam, jitter cover-up, intrinsic near-singular Sigma_ss) and REMOVED. Replaced by spanning-tree hand-forward. See PROGRESS Phase-4 cross-cutting decisions.

**Goal:** remove `_draw_joint`/`_strip_prior`/`_interiorness` + test_draw_joint.py; keep `_strip_network`; add `_tile_adjacency` (shared-node weighted graph), `_max_overlap_spanning_tree` (parent/order/dropped + connectivity assert), `_assert_tree_edge_separates`.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_spanning_tree.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py", "tests/unit/test_spanning_tree.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/unit/test_spanning_tree.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_tile_adjacency: shared-node-count weighted edges, sub-reach pairs excluded", "_max_overlap_spanning_tree: max-weight ST + parent/order/dropped", "disconnected adjacency raises (C6)", "per-tree-edge separation assert (thin tree edge raises)", "2x2: 3 tree edges + non-empty dropped + max-overlap optimal", "_draw_joint/_strip_prior removed; _strip_network kept"], "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: GmrfTreeKrigingSolve — spanning-tree hand-forward; repoint registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** generalize the proven chain `GmrfKrigingSolve._sweep` (line) to a max-overlap spanning tree: per tile independent white -> unconditional draw -> root unconditional, child kriged toward PARENT's already-drawn overlap VALUES (consistent residual => 4e8 Sigma_ss never excited) -> crossfade. Repoint _DRIVERS to GmrfTreeKrigingSolve; keep GmrfKrigingSolve (1-D regression); update only the one wiring assertion. Two white streams (no joint-white, C2').

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_tree_kriging_driver.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_driver.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_oracle.py tests/test_gmrf_blend.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py", "tests/unit/test_tree_kriging_driver.py", "tests/test_gmrf_blend.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/unit/test_tree_kriging_driver.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_driver.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_oracle.py tests/test_gmrf_blend.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["spanning-tree sweep: child kriged toward parent drawn values", "single tile == mean + L^-T w (chain-identical)", "registry repointed to GmrfTreeKrigingSolve", "GmrfKrigingSolve chain ._sweep tests stay green untouched", "only the single wiring assertion changed"], "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Stage-B oracles — tree-edge/dropped-edge/conservative-direction/two-tree-invariance
tasks.description:
**Goal:** pin the spanning-tree contracts with thresholds derived from the MEASURED chain baseline (~0.30, computed in-test, not hardcoded). Rebuild the 3 blend-routed oracle fixtures as REAL solved tiles (hand-stubbed prior_precision=None rotted). Oracles: per-tile full-cov ==(Q^i)^-1; two-stream independent white (C2'); tree-edge <= chain baseline; dropped-edge <= C*tree-edge (C in [2,3]); conservative direction (no under-dispersion); two-tree invariance; thin-tree-edge loud red.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/unit/test_tree_kriging_oracle.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_oracle.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/distributions/coherent.py", "tests/unit/test_tree_kriging_oracle.py", "tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_oracle.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/unit/test_tree_kriging_oracle.py tests/unit/test_gmrf_kriging_oracle.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-tile corrected cov == exact (Q^i)^-1 MC tol", "two white streams independent (C2')", "tree-edge relerr <= chain_baseline*(1+slack), baseline measured in-test", "dropped-edge relerr <= C*tree-edge (C in [2,3])", "conservative direction: cross-seam var ratio >= 1-eps on dropped edges", "two-tree invariance: blend within tol under MST + alt tree", "3 oracle fixtures rebuilt as real solved tiles"], "modelTier": "complex"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: STAGE-B GATE — spanning-tree sampler, three coupled assertions + two-tree invariance
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Spanning-tree sampler on real solved tiles (2x2 + 3-tile). Three coupled assertions, thresholds from the in-test-measured chain baseline (~0.30): (1) tree-edge relerr <= chain_baseline*(1+slack); (2) dropped-edge relerr <= C*tree-edge (C in [2,3]), recorded as known_bias; (3) conservative direction cross-seam var ratio >= 0.9 tree / >= 1-eps dropped, never under-dispersed. Plus two-tree invariance + nonstationary-kappa. Out-of-tolerance => STOP + surface junction-tree (sec 6) escalation; never loosen.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/test_tree_kriging_gate.py -v -s 2>&1 | tail -25

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_tree_kriging_gate.py", "tests/test_gmrf_blend.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/test_tree_kriging_gate.py -v -s 2>&1 | tail -25", "acceptanceCriteria": ["(1) max_tree_edge_relerr <= chain_baseline*(1+slack), baseline measured in-test", "(2) max_dropped_edge_relerr <= C*max_tree_edge (C in [2,3]); residual recorded as known_bias", "(3) conservative direction: cross-seam var ratio min >= 0.9 tree, >= 1-eps dropped (never under-dispersed)", "two-tree invariance: blend passes (1)-(3) under MST + alt tree", "nonstationary-kappa repeats (1)-(3) conservative", "out-of-tolerance fails loudly + surfaces junction-tree escalation", "1-D chain regression still green"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "gateScope": "stage-b", "requireEvidenceTokens": [["tree", "baseline"], ["dropped", "residual"]], "modelTier": "complex"}
```
